zh.title: File Manager
zh.tagline: Windows 桌面私人文件资料库，收纳散落文件并按类浏览
zh.description: 基于 Tauri 2 + React + Rust 开发的桌面文件整理工具。将桌面、下载文件夹中的文件收纳到统一资料库，按图片、视频、文档等分类浏览，支持缩略图网格、库内搜索与从桌面一键收纳，扫描与统计在 Rust 侧完成，避免大目录卡顿。
highlights: 桌面 / 下载文件夹一键收纳
图片、视频、文档分类浏览与缩略图网格
Rust 侧扫描统计，大目录不卡顿
库内搜索与版本发布 v0.3.1

en.title: File Manager
en.tagline: Desktop library for organizing scattered files on Windows
en.description: A Tauri 2 + React + Rust desktop app that collects files from Desktop and Downloads into a unified library. Browse by images, videos, and documents with thumbnail grids, in-library search, and one-click intake. Scanning and stats run in Rust to keep large folders responsive.
highlights: One-click intake from Desktop and Downloads
